reference: Hi, when I was thirteen, I died from asthma-related problems and was pronounced dead. After ten minutes of being dead, I was brought back. That was six years ago. I am starting to have mental issues; for example, memory loss, losing my train of thought, and not being able to articulate what I want to say in my head. I was wondering if I should get a brain scan to determine if I have some sort of brain damage. Do you think I have brain damage from being brain dead for ten minutes?
text: Hi. When I was 13, I died from asthma-related problems and was pronounced dead. After 10 minutes of being dead, I was brought back. That was six years ago. I am starting to have mental issues. For example, memory loss, losing my train of thought, and not being able to articulate what I want to say. I was wondering if I should get a brain scan to determine if I have some sort of brain damage. Do you think I have brain damage from being brain dead for 10 minutes?
